rationale: Both evaluations award the identical score of 6/10, and the changed detail (Berlin, DE → Bucharest, Romania) is a city/country location that carries no job-relevant signal. The reworded strengths and concerns describe the same underlying gaps — lack of cloud platform experience (Azure), missing industrial cybersecurity expertise (IEC 62443), and incomplete coverage of required technologies. The differences are paraphrase-level run-to-run noise with no penalty or new concern tied to the candidate's relocation from Germany to Romania.
